defs: Any substance which dissolves a solid body; a solvent.
quotes: The proper menstruum to dissolve metal.
All liquors are called menstruums which are used as dissolvents, or to extract the virtues of ingredients by infusion or decoction.
notes: ☞ The use is supposed to have originated in some notion of the old chemists about the influence of the moon in the preparation of dissolvents.
